Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x739E "TIPTRICK-739E" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tip-Trick.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $7E9E and the kernal save routine ($F5ED) at $7E61 to remove disk access from the game (for high score loading and saving).
